behaviors.description: The evaluate-stage command stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (evaluate command -> artifact writer), not single-function logic. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP: assertion is artifact key/routing, not model quality. MULTI-STEP: single stage. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: a Unit test of the formatter could pass while command wiring still writes to `plan` in the real pipeline. REJECTION-GATE: rejected System/Agentic/Workflow because behavior text is only about artifact slot selection in evaluate stage.
behaviors.test_description: Run evaluate stage with real stage wiring and artifact repository (in-process). Assert new/updated artifact key is `grounding`, `plan` is untouched by evaluate, and metadata reflects evaluate as producer.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Description requires cross-module wiring, matching Integration.

behaviors.description: The implement-stage flow reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: bug appears when implement reader and writer modules are combined (read `grounding`, write `plan`). REAL-INFRA: no external infra needed. LLM-DEP: can validate with fixed grounding fixture; not testing model judgment. MULTI-STEP: single stage behavior. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: Unit test of read helper or write helper alone misses swapped keys in orchestrator path. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic/Workflow since behavior text checks routing/use of artifacts, not quality of generated content across multiple model decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Seed run context with a `grounding` artifact, execute implement flow with deterministic input, assert implement consumed grounding (e.g., provenance/reference marker) and wrote output only to `plan` artifact.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Needs stage orchestration + artifact store interaction, which is Integration.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure occurs in deep-dive orchestration between issue-content check and artifact-write side effect. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess boundary required. LLM-DEP: branch condition can be deterministic fixture (issue already has diagnosis). MULTI-STEP: single stage. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: Unit test of diagnosis detector could pass while deep-dive command still performs unintended `plan` write. REJECTION-GATE: rejected higher levels because behavior text targets suppression of a side effect, not model-output correctness or full pipeline sequencing.
behaviors.test_description: Provide issue content that includes diagnosis, run deep-dive stage with real stage wiring, assert no write/update occurs on `plan` artifact while expected non-plan outputs remain intact.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Test depends on interaction of condition evaluation and artifact writer.

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read the `grounding` artifact produced earlier in the same run context.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: lineage bugs are cross-module (artifact persistence/indexing + run-context lookup). REAL-INFRA: can be caught with in-process repository; no real network/OS requirement stated. LLM-DEP: only checks identity/provenance handoff, not model quality. MULTI-STEP: two deterministic stage interactions, but not requiring real agentic decisions. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: Unit test of lineage metadata serializer misses mismatch between writer IDs and implement lookup query. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Workflow because behavior text is lineage readability in same context, not validating end-to-end agentic decision chain.
behaviors.test_description: Execute evaluate write of `grounding` in a run context, then execute implement lookup in that same context; assert implement resolves the exact prior grounding artifact (ID/provenance continuity).
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires composed storage + lookup path across modules.

behaviors.description: In a full multi-step agent run (`deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement`), the final implementation plan reflects grounding produced earlier in the run.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure appears only when sequential stage handoffs and agent decisions are exercised end-to-end. REAL-INFRA: not primarily OS/network bound. LLM-DEP: correctness depends on model actually using grounding in final plan; stubs can mask this. MULTI-STEP: explicitly multiple agentic steps in sequence. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: Integration with stubbed model can pass artifact plumbing while real model ignores or misuses grounding; only full workflow run catches that. REJECTION-GATE: rejected Agentic-only because behavior text explicitly requires the chained `deep-dive -> evaluate -> implement` pipeline outcome, not a single model call.
behaviors.test_description: Run the real multi-stage agent pipeline in one run context with realistic issue input; assert final `plan` contains grounding-derived constraints/facts traceable to earlier `grounding` artifact and stage lineage is intact.
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Description explicitly requires multi-step agent pipeline, matching Workflow.

behaviors.description: When grounding is absent, implement falls back safely and still emits a valid plan artifact without corrupting other stored artifacts.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is in orchestrator fallback + artifact-write isolation across repository modules. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess needed. LLM-DEP: validity can be schema/structural; not model-quality-dependent. MULTI-STEP: single implement-stage fallback path. LOWER-LEVEL-MISS-PROOF: Unit test of fallback function misses accidental repository mutation that clobbers unrelated artifacts during implement write. REJECTION-GATE: rejected higher levels because behavior text is safe fallback and artifact integrity, not AI output quality or chained agentic decisions.
behaviors.test_description: Start with run context containing non-grounding artifacts and no `grounding`; execute implement flow; assert a valid `plan` artifact is produced and pre-existing artifacts are unchanged (keys, IDs, payloads).
behaviors.plan_consistent_note: Requires interacting modules (fallback logic + repository mutation checks).
